Guardian oscillation confirmed: C28 protocol mismatch - C29 kill loop returns. 00:43 snapshot gateway_logs shows kill loop only (30x Killing/Correct cycles), zero protocol mismatch traces. Guardian oscillates between two error modes.

Session inflation persistent at 45 (same as C28). No growth from 45, stable but high. 8 recent sessions visible with similar age distribution as C28.

Guardian kill loop sustainability: 04:43 snapshot pure kill loop (20x Killing/Correct). C28 protocol mismatch - C29 kill loop - C30 still kill loop. >=8h continuous. Oscillation is phase-persistent not rapid alternation.

Health warnings auto-fixed: C29 5 warnings - C30 2 warnings. auto_fixes_applied field new (bundledDiscovery=compat, memory-core added). codex failure and groupAllowFrom warnings disappeared. Endpoint self-healing capability observed.
Snapshot format evolution: gateway_logs restructured, health_check gains auto_fixes_applied, export_agent removed. Sessions still 45 (C28-C30 stable). No substantive operational change.

Guardian retired (D051). Kill loop eliminated. gateway_logs 12:43 pure protocol mismatch only (50 repeated errors). C30 04:43 had kill loop (20x Killing/Correct). Guardian was monitoring service killing wrong PID. Oscillation framework invalidated - kill loop was Guardian artifact not comm mode switching.

Protocol mismatch now single persistent error mode. Guardian retired reveals prior multi-mode oscillation was artifact. Version mismatch config 2026.5.12 vs runtime 2026.5.4 now sole hypothesis. Causal graph purified.

D051 decision record: NodeHostGuardian service retired. 47 total decisions. Guardian identified as independent monitoring service killing wrong PID. Manual intervention (not auto-fix) - corrects H34. Two separate correction channels identified: auto_fixes + manual decisions.
